title: LowFiresPack
description: Low Fire Pack With Both Normal Fire And Soul Fire.
body:
![fire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfacc8b93afa72845c5e00b3b5ee26224968ce50.jpeg)Low Fire Pack Featuring Soul Fire As Well As Regular Fire.

The Fire in This Pack Won't Cover Your Screen.

Players are allowed to utilize this pack in their own packs.
